title: SuppressionEntry
description: An address that must never be contacted again. The suppression list is authoritative: opt-outs, bounces, and complaints are added immediately and checked before every send. The live list is runtime data (data/prospects/, gitignored). Committed examples must use synthetic addresses; storing the SHA-256 of the normalized email is preferred over the raw value.

email.description: Raw address — runtime/gitignored only. Never commit a real address.

email_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the normalized (lowercased, trimmed) email; safe to retain.

source.description: Where the suppression originated (reply_handling, bounce_webhook, founder, partner).
